creator: noone@nowhere.com
text:
can not configure network

possible clue:
On the "Network Interface Information Required" menu, the option to select is displayed as:  nfe0 = NVIDIA nForce MCP Ethernet

There is no "nfe0" driver.  The option should be:
nve0 = NVIDIA nForce MCP Ethernet

Fix: 

maybe fix the typeo?
"nfe0" should be "nve0"
How-To-Repeat: try installing it
